This repository provides a serverless, client-side Office suite that allows users to edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents directly in their browser using WebAssembly. It prioritizes user privacy by processing all data locally, with no backend interaction required.

This Python repository provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes financial data from Financial Datasets. It allows AI assistants like Claude to access and retrieve various financial statements, stock prices, and company news through a defined interface.

React-pdf/renderer is a React renderer for creating PDF documents on both the browser and server. It allows developers to build PDFs using React components and styling, similar to how they build web UIs.

рҹ“… Created: Feb 2026 вҖў Updated: Mar 2026

вң… Real-time system metrics collection (CPU, memory, load average)
вң… Per-process monitoring
вң… Rule-based resource limiting
вң… CPU and memory restriction via cgroups v2
вң… Configurable duration thresholds
вң… Process termination support
вң… Live top CPU process viewer
вң… Structured configuration via TOML


в–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Ә

вӯҗ 3 рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 1 рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 0 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

в–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Ә

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Load-Monitor is a Rust-based daemon for Linux that automatically throttles resource-intensive processes using cgroups v2. It monitors CPU and RAM usage, applying configurable rules to limit or terminate processes that exceed defined thresholds.

в–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Әв–Ә
